    By MosesEx 24:18;34:28;De 9:9,25

  .Wanderings of the Israelites in the wildernessEx 16:35;Nu 14:34
  .Peace in IsraelJud 3:11;5:31;8:28
  .Egypt to be desolatedEze 29:11
  .To be restored afterEze 29:13
